problem_statement: LLM-based coding tools produce hallucinated, contextually inconsistent, and integration-fragile code, so the study examines how human-in-the-loop oversight can ensure the quality, consistency, and security of AI-generated code in a real project (Kolay.ai).
magnitude_evidence: LLMs accelerate development cycles by 30–40%, reduce errors by 30%, and improve onboarding efficiency by 20% (Kolay.ai case study)
insufficiency_evidence: "certain vulnerabilities persist in LLM-generated code, underscoring the necessity of manual testing and code audits"; hallucinated outputs "necessitated manual intervention" and LLMs "struggle with long-term context, requiring frequent redirection"
solution_mechanisms: iterative sprint reviews with feedback loops
CI checkpoints with automated alerts for human intervention
key_constructs: structured prompt engineering within modular architecture
